title: Platform Map For Non-Technical Teams
shortSummary: A practical comparison of AWS, Azure, GCP, Heroku, and Snowflake without assuming engineering expertise.
whyItMatters: Most non-technical decisions do not require deep infrastructure knowledge, but they do require knowing which platform families are broad, which are simpler, which are enterprise-heavy, and which are built for data.
coreConcepts: AWS as the broadest cloud platform
Azure as Microsoft's enterprise cloud ecosystem
GCP as a strong data, analytics, and modern developer platform
Heroku as a simplified app platform
Snowflake as a cloud-native data platform rather than a general cloud
mentalModels: Simplify the choice by primary job

goDeeper.label: See the Data Science subject
goDeeper.description: Useful when Snowflake and analytics become the main interest.
